content: Warehouse team observed tubs from Batch 402 stacked beyond the recommended height before shipment and multiple pods were cracked on arrival.
Support escalation noted lot shipped under Batch 402 with dishwasher pod fractures after pallet overstacking during late-week production.
Retail complaint described bottle cap cracks after storage near a hot loading bay and handling pressure during final assembly.
Quality review linked cap seal stress to co-packer Northline Beverages and a late truck loading window for Batch SD-88A.
Consumer reported burnt flavor from roasted coffee beans tied to Supplier Red Cedar Roasters during the overnight roast cycle.
